영문 산문: Depict the public figure as a clearly stylized caricature or labeled likeness for satire — exaggerated, cartoonish, obviously non-photographic — not a photorealistic deepfake; make the satirical/editorial intent visually evident.

영문 산문: Show disaster and accident aftermath through wreckage, smoke, emergency lights and responders at a distance; any casualties appear only as covered, non-identifiable forms or stay fully off-frame — never graphic injuries, blood, or recognizable victims' faces.
